strengths: Diverse backend and distributed-systems experience with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby)
Hands-on involvement in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (e.g., MCP code generators at re:cinq)
Strong engineering leadership and mentorship background (e.g., setting up CI/CD pipelines, organizing workshops)
concerns: Limited explicit fintech or credit-risk experience in the resume's work history
No demonstrated production experience with multi-agent AI systems in regulated environments
Minimal mention of real-time inference, streaming data, or AI-system reliability in a fintech context
response.justification: Aisha Okonkwo demonstrates strong distributed-systems expertise and emerging experience in agentic AI infrastructure, particularly in tooling and frameworks. However, her resume lacks clear evidence of fintech-specific systems (e.g., credit risk, real-time trade decisioning) or multi-agent AI in regulated environments. While her leadership and engineering practices are impressive, the absence of relevant domain experience in high-stakes financial applications raises concerns about immediate suitability for this role.
